name: claude
description: Use Claude Code from Codex through stewarded, inspectable implementation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Let Claude design and implement under Codex stewardship
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code as a design and implementation collaborator from Codex while keeping Codex as the steward of prompts, logs, cleanup, verification, and final shipping judgment. App UI and frontend implementation work must go through Claude's implementation pass first. Includes an explainer skill for polished single-file HTML explainers.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude to implement a UI pass
Run a streamed Claude frontend pass
